textByHash.c7c5bb2097556f127f3c6126dc743844419005b4: Hmm... It's none of your concern. Move along.
textByHash.555f49125b712c098658b2620e1d2ea3fe77c26b: What's this game you're playing? Are you with them?
textByHash.5e25e069a588de549f77b003a77245194e9b0924: Good. They've decided they don't like me too much, what with me killing about eight of them...
textByHash.8e793f98f2e19e76d9afb1585b1f72116cc82d12: Is that you making me an offer?
textByHash.cd218acd0ab1adf055155cd4d60da3437d2f2149: Hmm... Well, maybe you should let me know when you are...
textByHash.589f2ee80424c1885e77af9ee488c992a84208e2: Hmm... I don't know... You say you're not one of them, but I reckon you're trying to fool me!
textByHash.6d2aeb4945e0d579d1bf9e4ef5947add752c6845: Hmm... Dogs can't swim, can they? Yes... I think this might work...
textByHash.e3f4c33989cf227013ed78fde7b2c62558ad9327: Being on your crew is keeping me one step ahead of them, Captain, and that's all I ask.
textByHash.46c6a31d79e5c1f6147549094fbcfab227082181: The fear keeps me safe, Captain.
